nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Olive-crowned yellowthroat
nodes.summary: The olive-crowned yellowthroat (Geothlypis semiflava) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, and Panama. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist shrubland and heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.name: Geothlypis
nodes.summary: Geothlypis（Geothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Mourning warbler、MacGillivray's warbler、Grey-crowned yellowthroat等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Olive-crowned yellowthroat
nodes.summary: Olive-crowned yellowthroat（Geothlypis semiflava）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Olive-crowned yellowthroat。
